name: Mailchimp Marketing
shortDescription: Comprehensive email marketing automation platform for audience management, campaign creation, and subscriber engagement tracking.

actions.name: Get Lists Info
actions.description: Gets information about all lists in the account

actions.name: Add Member To List
actions.description: Adds a new member to the list

actions.name: Add Or Update List Member
actions.description: Adds or updates a list member

actions.name: Unsubscribe Or Delete List Member
actions.description: Unsubscribes or deletes a member from the list

actions.name: Search Member
actions.description: Searches for a member in your Mailchimp audience. Optionally creates a member if none is found

actions.name: Add Member Note
actions.description: Adds a new note for a specific subscriber

actions.name: Archive List Member
actions.description: Archives a list member. To permanently delete, use the delete-permanent action

actions.name: Add Member Tag
actions.description: Adds a tag to a list member

actions.name: Remove Member Tag
actions.description: Removes a tag from a list member

actions.name: Create Tag
actions.description: Creates a new tag in your Mailchimp account

actions.name: Search Tag
actions.description: Searches for a tag. Optionally, creates a tag if none is found

actions.name: Get Campaign Info
actions.description: Gets information about a specific campaign

idealUseCases: Email marketing campaign management and automation
Subscriber list building and audience segmentation
Newsletter distribution and subscriber engagement tracking
Event-based email automation and trigger campaigns
A/B testing for email campaign optimization
